name: {{APP}}
_runServices: Must match the services defined in docker-compose.yml — drop `redis` and/or `oidc` here too if the app doesn't use them.
_ports: Nothing is published on the host: the app, postgres, redis and the OIDC sidecar are reached through devrouter over the shared `devnet` network (https://{{APP}}.localhost, db.{{APP}}.localhost:5432, etc.). Run `devrouter setup --yes` before bringing the container up so `devnet` exists, then run `devrouter repo devcontainer verify --live --yes --json` after startup for route evidence. No forwardPorts needed.
